refinement_sections.content: Explain what the beverage market is and why launching a new product is important for the company.
Identify what demand is and how it can be measured. Discuss factors that might affect demand for the new beverage, like taste preferences or health trends.
Look at competitors in the beverage market. Mention how their products might influence our product's success.
Define what a pricing strategy is. Talk about how to set a price that can attract customers but still make money.
List possible visual aids like graphs or charts that could help show demand trends or pricing comparisons.
Summarize the main points of the report and how they will help the company make a decision about the new product.
